name: Apricot-Cardamon Bars & Apricot Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together flour, packed brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and ground cardamom (or cloves).
2. In a separate bowl, combine apricot nectar or orange juice, applesauce, oil, and egg until well combined.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir in the finely snipped dried apricots.
4. Spread the batter into an ungreased 11x7x1-1/2-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 25 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the bars to cool in the pan on a wire rack.
7. Drizzle with apricot icing and cut into bars.
Apricot Icing:
1. In a small bowl, mix together powdered sugar and 2 to 3 teaspoons of apricot nectar or orange juice until smooth.
Nutrition Facts per Serving: 67 calories, 1 gram total fat (0 grams saturated fat), 9 mg cholesterol, 17 grams carbohydrates, 0 grams fiber, 1 gram protein. Daily Value: 3% Vitamin A, 3% Vitamin C, 0% Calcium, 3% Iron.
